mapper.sql: id, created_time, created_timestamp, created_by, modified_time, modified_timestamp, modified_by, audit_status, seq, org_id
boa.id, boa.created_time, boa.created_timestamp, boa.created_by, boa.modified_time, boa.modified_timestamp, boa.modified_by, boa.audit_status, boa.seq, boa.org_id
mapper.delete: delete from org_audit where org_id in
mapper.select:
select
from org_audit where deleted = 0 and org_id = #{orgId} order by created_time desc limit 1

select
from org_audit boa inner join `org` bo on boa.org_id = bo.id and bo.deleted = 0 and bo.status = 1 and bo.audit_status = 2 where boa.deleted = 0 and bo.id = #{orgId} order by boa.seq desc
